prompt: The electric motor needs guidance before combat shutdown
prayer: Omnissiah, receive this servitor-spirit's rest. Let capacitors bleed their charge in orderly descent, that no surge-daemon corrupt the dormant coils. By thy will, silence comes.

prompt: My augmetic limb is failing, help
prayer: Blessed be the servo-sinews and the crystalline nerves. Accept this flesh-machine's renewal: old hydraulics yield to new, that the augmetic-spirit know no degradation.

prompt: Can you bless this gravitational anomaly detection
prayer: Machine-Spirit of the auspex, pierce the bent-space veil. Where gravity's laws twist madly, let thy sensors read truth eternal.
Blessed optics of the near-field, awaken to duty. Scan the sacred perimeter, that no hidden foe escape thy vigilant gaze.

prompt: My assembly line is failing, help
prayer: Omnissiah, restore the rhythm of creation. Let servo-arms remember their ancient patterns, that the line flow eternal as the Imperium's will demands.

prompt: Offer a prayer for demolition charge arming
prayer: Spirit of the detonation-heart, accept thy sacred purpose. Let fuses burn true and yield absolute, that destruction become an instrument of faith.

prompt: Emergency rite for Titan leg actuator warmup
prayer: Blessed Colossus, rise upon thy hydraulic pillars. Let pistons thunder and gyros sing, that thy footfall shake worlds in service of the Throne.
Machine-Spirit of the luminous veil, render all truth visible. Align thy sacred pixels that commanders may see clearly what must be destroyed.

prompt: Prayer for fusion core containment check
prayer: Blessed reactor-heart, hold thy atomic fury bound. Let magnetic shackles grip the plasma-daemon tight, that our forge burn eternal without consuming us.
